modules.module_title: Green Buildings aur Sustainability ka Parichay
Green Building Materials aur Construction Techniques
Indoor Environmental Quality (IEQ) aur Waste Management

questions.question: Green Building ka primary aim kya hai?

options.B: Environment par negative impact kam karna

questions.explanation: Green Building ka mukhya uddeshya environment par building ke negative impacts ko kam karna hai, jaise energy consumption aur pollution.

questions.question: Sustainable development ki definition mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Future generations ki needs ko compromise kiye bina present needs ko pura karna
options.B: Sirf economic growth par focus karna
options.C: Sirf environmental protection par focus karna

questions.explanation: Sustainable development ka matlab hai ki hum apni present needs ko is tarah pura karein ki future generations apni needs ko pura karne ki ability ko compromise na karein.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'Life Cycle Assessment' (LCA) ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf building ke construction phase ka analysis karna
options.B: Building materials ke cost ka calculation karna
options.C: Building ke materials se lekar disposal tak ke environmental impacts ka evaluation karna
options.D: Building ki maintenance cost estimate karna

questions.explanation: LCA ek comprehensive method hai jo kisi product ya service ke pure life cycle (extraction, manufacturing, use, disposal) mein hone wale environmental impacts ko assess karta hai.

questions.question: Ek Green Building mein natural ventilation ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Air conditioning ki zarurat badh jaati hai
options.B: Energy consumption kam hota hai aur fresh air milti hai
options.C: Building ki structural strength kam hoti hai
options.D: Interior design mein restrictions aate hain

questions.explanation: Natural ventilation se mechanical cooling ki zarurat kam hoti hai, jisse energy bachti hai aur indoor air quality improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building design mein 'passive design' principles ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Active mechanical systems ka maximum use karna
options.B: Building ke design aur orientation se natural energy sources ka use karna
options.D: Sirf expensive materials ka use karna

questions.explanation: Passive design mein building ki location, orientation, windows aur materials ka use karke heating, cooling aur lighting ke liye natural energy sources (sunlight, wind) ka fayda uthaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein site selection ka ek important factor kya hai?

options.A: Building ko city ke center mein banana
options.B: Public transport access ke paas hona

questions.explanation: Public transport ke paas site select karne se commute ke liye private vehicles ka use kam hota hai, jisse emissions reduce hote hain.

questions.question: 'Carbon footprint' kya measure karta hai?

options.B: Ek activity ya entity dwara produce kiye gaye greenhouse gases ki total amount ko
options.C: Building ke foundation ki depth ko
options.D: Building mein use hone wale wood ki quantity ko

questions.explanation: Carbon footprint environmental impact ka ek measure hai, jo kisi vyakti, organization ya product dwara generate kiye gaye greenhouse gases ko quantify karta hai.

questions.question: Green Building practices se kaunsa environmental benefit hota hai?

options.B: Reduced landfill waste

questions.explanation: Green Building practices mein waste reduction aur recycling par focus kiya jaata hai, jisse landfills mein jaane wale kachre ki matra kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Climate change mein Green Buildings ka kya contribution ho sakta hai?

options.B: Climate change ke impacts ko mitigate karna

questions.explanation: Green Buildings energy efficiency, renewable energy aur sustainable materials ka use karke greenhouse gas emissions ko kam karte hain, jisse climate change ke impacts ko mitigate kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek Green Building mein 'embodied energy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Building ko operate karne ke liye use hone wali energy
options.B: Materials ke extraction, manufacturing, transport aur installation mein consume hone wali energy
options.C: Solar panels se generate hone wali energy
options.D: Building ko demolish karne mein lagne wali energy

questions.explanation: Embodied energy woh total energy hai jo kisi material ya product ko banate aur uski life cycle mein use karte hue consume hoti hai, extraction se lekar disposal tak.

questions.question: Green Building design mein daylighting ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Energy consumption kam karna aur occupants ki well-being improve karna

questions.explanation: Daylighting se artificial lighting ki zarurat kam hoti hai, jisse energy bachti hai aur natural light se occupants ka mood aur productivity improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building projects mein 'integrated design process' kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf architects ko decision lene ke liye
options.B: Project ke shuruat se hi sabhi stakeholders ko collaborate karne ke liye
options.D: Costs ko ignore karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Integrated design process mein project ke early stages se hi architects, engineers, clients aur contractors milkar kaam karte hain, jisse holistic aur efficient solutions milte hain.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'heat island effect' ko kam karne ke liye kya kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Reflective ya green roofs ka use karna

questions.explanation: Heat island effect cities mein temperature increase ko refer karta hai. Reflective (cool) ya green roofs sunlight ko absorb karne ki bajaye reflect karte hain ya cool karte hain, jisse temperature kam hota hai.

questions.question: Global warming ka ek major reason kya hai?

options.B: Greenhouse gases ka atmosphere mein increase hona

questions.explanation: Greenhouse gases jaise Carbon Dioxide (CO2), Methane (CH4) aur Nitrous Oxide (N2O) atmosphere mein heat trap karte hain, jisse global warming hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building construction mein 'prefabrication' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Site par zyada waste generate karna
options.B: Construction time aur waste kam karna
options.D: Zyada skilled labor ki zarurat hona

questions.explanation: Prefabrication mein building components ko factory mein banaya jaata hai aur phir site par assemble kiya jaata hai, jisse waste kam hota hai aur construction faster hota hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'biodiversity' ko promote karne ka ek tarika kya hai?

options.A: Native plants ki bajaye exotic plants lagana
options.B: Green spaces aur native landscaping create karna

questions.explanation: Native plants aur green spaces provide karne se local wildlife aur pollinators ko habitat milta hai, jisse biodiversity promote hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building practices mein 'resilience' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Building ka jaldi demolish ho jaana
options.B: Building ka natural disasters aur climate change ke impacts ko withstand aur recover karna
options.C: Building ka sirf aesthetic look par focus karna

questions.explanation: Resilience ka matlab hai ki building severe weather events, natural disasters aur climate change ke adverse effects ko jhel sake aur jaldi recover ho sake.

questions.question: Green Building materials mein 'recycled content' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Virgin resources par dependence kam karna

questions.explanation: Recycled materials ka use karne se naye resources ki mining aur processing ki zarurat kam hoti hai, jisse environmental impact reduce hota hai.

questions.question: 'Fly ash' kya hai aur ise Green Building mein kaise use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Coal combustion ka byproduct jo cement ke substitute ke roop mein use hota hai

questions.explanation: Fly ash thermal power plants se nikalne wala ek waste product hai, jise cement ke partial substitute ke roop mein concrete mein milaya jaata hai, jisse cement production se hone wale emissions kam hote hain.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'local materials' use karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Transport cost aur emissions kam karna

questions.explanation: Local materials use karne se materials ko lambi doori tak transport karne ki zarurat nahi padti, jisse fuel consumption aur associated emissions kam hote hain.

questions.question: VOCs (Volatile Organic Compounds) kya hain aur Green Buildings mein inka kya concern hai?

options.B: Hawa mein release hone wale chemicals jo health ke liye harmful ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: VOCs paints, adhesives aur cleaning products se nikalne wale chemicals hain jo indoor air quality ko degrade karte hain aur health issues create kar sakte hain. Green Buildings low-VOC products ko prefer karte hain.

questions.question: Bamboo ko Green Building material kyon mana jaata hai?

options.A: Yeh bahut dheere grow karta hai
options.B: Yeh ek rapidly renewable resource hai aur strong hota hai
options.C: Iski cultivation se bahut zyada water lagta hai
options.D: Yeh toxic gases release karta hai

questions.explanation: Bamboo ek tezi se badhne wala plant hai jise kam resources mein grow kiya ja sakta hai aur yeh wood ka ek sustainable alternative hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'reclaimed wood' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Purani buildings se nikali hui wood ka use karna

questions.explanation: Reclaimed wood purani structures (jaise barns, factories) se nikali jaati hai aur ise naye projects mein use kiya jaata hai, jisse naye ped kaatne ki zarurat kam hoti hai aur waste reduce hota hai.

questions.question: Cool roofs ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Sunlight ko reflect karna aur building ko thanda rakhna

questions.explanation: Cool roofs special reflective coatings ya materials se bane hote hain jo sunlight ko reflect karte hain, jisse building ka interior temperature kam hota hai aur AC ki zarurat kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Insulation materials Green Buildings mein kyon important hain?

options.A: Building ko zyada garam banane ke liye
options.B: Heat loss aur heat gain ko kam karne ke liye
options.D: Building ka weight badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Good insulation building ke andar ki temperature ko regulate karta hai, jisse heating aur cooling ke liye kam energy lagti hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'modular construction' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Site par zyada noise aur pollution
options.B: Off-site manufacturing aur assembly se construction speed aur quality control improve hoti hai

questions.explanation: Modular construction mein building ke sections ko factory mein banaya jaata hai, jisse controlled environment mein quality improve hoti hai aur site par waste aur disturbance kam hota hai.

questions.question: Green Concrete mein kis material ka use common hai jo environmental impact kam karta hai?

options.B: Fly ash ya slag jaise supplementary cementitious materials

questions.explanation: Fly ash aur ground granulated blast-furnace slag (GGBS) jaise materials cement ki jagah use kiye jaate hain, jisse cement production se hone wale CO2 emissions kam hote hain.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'bioplastics' ka kya potential use hai?

options.B: Non-structural applications jaise insulation, piping ya interior finishes ke liye

questions.explanation: Bioplastics plant-based materials se bante hain aur traditional plastics se zyada sustainable hote hain. Inka use non-structural components mein kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'recycled steel' ka use kyon kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Steel manufacturing mein bahut energy lagti hai, aur recycled steel use karne se energy bachti hai

questions.explanation: Recycled steel use karne se naye steel ke production mein hone wali energy consumption aur emissions kam hote hain, jo ki ek highly energy-intensive process hai.

questions.question: Ek Green Building mein paints aur coatings mein kya features hone chahiye?

options.B: Low VOC content aur non-toxic properties

questions.explanation: Low VOC aur non-toxic paints indoor air quality maintain karte hain aur occupants ke health ke liye safe hote hain.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'green walls' ya 'vertical gardens' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Air quality improve karna, insulation provide karna aur aesthetic value badhana

questions.explanation: Green walls air pollutants ko filter karte hain, building ko insulate karte hain, aur urban areas mein greenery badhate hain.

questions.question: Green Building construction mein 'deconstruction' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Building ko blast karke demolish karna
options.B: Building ko dismantle karna taaki materials ko reuse ya recycle kiya ja sake
options.D: Sirf building ke aesthetics par focus karna

questions.explanation: Deconstruction demolition ka ek sustainable alternative hai, jisme building components ko carefully alag kiya jaata hai taaki unhe waste na karke dobara use kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'Straw Bale' construction ka ek benefit kya hai?

options.B: Excellent insulation properties aur renewable material

questions.explanation: Straw bales agricultural waste se bante hain, jo ek renewable resource hai. Inme high insulation value hoti hai, jisse energy saving hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'recycled glass' ka kya use ho sakta hai?

options.B: Countertops, tiles, insulation aur aggregate ke roop mein

questions.explanation: Recycled glass ko various architectural applications mein use kiya ja sakta hai, jaise decorative finishes, flooring, aur concrete aggregate ke substitute ke roop mein.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein energy efficiency ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Utni hi output ke liye kam energy use karna
options.C: Sirf renewable energy sources use karna

questions.explanation: Energy efficiency ka matlab hai ki hum apne appliances, heating, cooling aur lighting systems ko is tarah design aur operate karein ki kam energy mein wahi performance mile.

questions.question: LED lights ko Green Buildings mein kyon prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Yeh zyada heat generate karte hain
options.B: Yeh traditional bulbs se kam energy use karte hain aur zyada chalte hain
options.C: Yeh costly hote hain aur jaldi kharab hote hain
options.D: Yeh harmful UV rays emit karte hain

questions.explanation: LEDs bahut energy efficient hote hain, inki lifespan lambi hoti hai aur yeh kam heat generate karte hain, jisse cooling load bhi kam hota hai.

questions.question: Solar panels (Photovoltaic systems) ka primary use kya hai Green Building mein?

options.B: Electricity generate karne ke liye
options.C: Building ko decorate karne ke liye
options.D: Natural ventilation provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Photovoltaic (PV) panels sunlight ko direct electricity mein convert karte hain, jo building ki electrical needs ko pura karne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: HVAC system ki efficiency improve karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Filters ko regularly change na karna
options.B: High-efficiency HVAC equipment install karna aur regular maintenance karna
options.D: Thermostat settings ko constantly change karna

questions.explanation: High-efficiency equipment aur regular maintenance se HVAC systems kam energy use karte hain aur better perform karte hain.

questions.question: Geothermal energy ka Green Building mein kya application hai?

options.B: Space heating aur cooling ke liye

questions.explanation: Geothermal heat pumps zameen ke andar ke stable temperature ka use karke buildings ko garam ya thanda karte hain, jo ki ek highly efficient method hai.

questions.question: Building envelope ka energy efficiency mein kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf building ke exterior look ko define karna
options.B: Building ke interior aur exterior environment ke beech barrier provide karna
options.C: Water collection system ka part hona

questions.explanation: Building envelope (walls, roof, windows) heat gain aur heat loss ko control karta hai. Well-insulated aur air-tight envelope energy efficiency ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Energy audits Green Buildings mein kyon conduct kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Building ki financial value check karne ke liye
options.B: Energy consumption patterns ko identify karna aur efficiency improvements suggest karna
options.D: Interior design evaluate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Energy audit building ke energy use ka detailed analysis hai, jo un areas ko pinpoint karta hai jahan energy waste ho rahi hai aur improvements ki ja sakti hain.

questions.question: Smart thermostats ka kya fayda hai Green Building mein?

options.A: Sirf manual temperature control provide karna
options.B: Temperature ko intelligently adjust karna aur energy save karna
options.D: Internet connection ki zarurat na hona

questions.explanation: Smart thermostats occupancy, weather aur user preferences ke hisaab se heating aur cooling ko optimize karte hain, jisse energy waste kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Wind turbines ka Green Building mein kya use hai?

options.B: Wind energy se electricity generate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Small-scale wind turbines buildings mein ya unke paas install kiye ja sakte hain, jo wind power se clean electricity generate karte hain.

questions.question: Building Management Systems (BMS) Green Buildings mein kaise help karte hain?

options.A: Building ke operations ko manually control karna
options.B: Heating, ventilation, lighting aur security jaise systems ko centrally monitor aur control karna, jisse efficiency badhti hai

questions.explanation: BMS ek centralized computer-based system hai jo building ke various mechanical aur electrical systems ko automate aur optimize karta hai, jisse energy efficiency aur operational cost savings hoti hain.

questions.question: Green Building mein natural daylighting ko maximize karne ke liye kya design features use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Large windows, skylights aur light shelves

questions.explanation: Large windows, skylights, aur light shelves sunlight ko building ke andar tak penetrate karne mein madad karte hain, jisse artificial lighting ki zarurat kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Energy Star certification kis cheez ke liye di jaati hai?

options.A: Building ke structural integrity ke liye
options.B: Energy efficient products aur buildings ke liye

questions.explanation: Energy Star ek U.S. government-backed symbol hai jo superior energy efficiency products aur practices ko identify karta hai, jisse consumers energy aur money save kar sakein.

questions.question: Thermal mass ka Green Building mein kya fayda hai?

options.B: Heat ko absorb aur store karna, aur phir dheere-dheere release karna

questions.explanation: Thermal mass materials (jaise concrete, stone) din mein heat absorb karte hain aur raat mein release karte hain, ya vice-versa, jisse indoor temperature stabilize hota hai aur heating/cooling load kam hota hai.

questions.question: Occupancy sensors ka use Green Buildings mein kahan kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Water consumption monitor karne ke liye
options.B: Lighting aur HVAC systems ko control karne ke liye jab koi room mein ho
options.D: Solar panel efficiency check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Occupancy sensors jab room mein koi nahi hota toh lights aur HVAC ko automatically off kar dete hain, jisse energy waste kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Renewable energy sources ka ek example kya hai jo Green Buildings mein use hota hai?

options.B: Natural Gas

questions.explanation: Solar energy ek renewable source hai jo sunlight se derive hoti hai aur Green Buildings mein electricity generation ya water heating ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'demand-controlled ventilation' (DCV) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Indoor air quality sensors ke through ventilation rate ko adjust karna
options.C: Sirf outdoor air ko circulate karna
options.D: Manual ventilation control ko promote karna

questions.explanation: DCV systems CO2 ya VOC levels jaise parameters ko measure karte hain aur uske according ventilation rate ko adjust karte hain, jisse energy save hoti hai aur indoor air quality maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Windows mein low-emissivity (low-e) coating ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Zyada UV rays andar aane dena
options.B: Heat transfer ko kam karna, jisse heating aur cooling energy bachti hai

questions.explanation: Low-e coatings glass par ek thin metallic layer hoti hai jo infrared (heat) light ko reflect karti hai, jisse garmi mein heat gain aur sardi mein heat loss kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'rainwater harvesting' ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: Baarish ke paani ko waste karna
options.B: Baarish ke paani ko collect aur store karna non-potable uses ke liye

questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting mein baarish ke paani ko roofs ya other surfaces se collect karke toilets flush karne, gardening ya cleaning jaise kaam ke liye use kiya jaata hai, jisse potable water ki demand kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Low-flow fixtures (taps, showerheads) ka kya fayda hai Green Buildings mein?

options.B: Water consumption kam karna

questions.explanation: Low-flow fixtures kam paani use karte hain bina user experience ko compromise kiye, jisse water conservation hota hai.

questions.question: 'Greywater recycling' system ka kya use hai Green Building mein?

options.B: Used water (bath, laundry) ko treat karke non-potable uses ke liye reuse karna

questions.explanation: Greywater recycling mein sink, shower aur washing machine se nikle paani ko treat karke toilets, irrigation ya cleaning jaise purposes ke liye reuse kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Water-efficient landscaping mein kaunse plants prefer kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Zyada paani ki zarurat wale plants
options.B: Native aur drought-tolerant plants

questions.explanation: Native aur drought-tolerant plants local climate ke liye suitable hote hain aur unhe kam paani ki zarurat hoti hai, jisse irrigation water save hota hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'pervious pavements' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Baarish ke paani ko zameen mein seep hone dena aur runoff kam karna

questions.explanation: Pervious pavements (jaise porous concrete ya permeable pavers) paani ko unke through zameen mein jaane dete hain, jisse storm water runoff kam hota hai aur groundwater recharge hota hai.

questions.question: Dual-flush toilets ka kya benefit hai Green Building mein?

options.A: Sirf ek hi flush option dena
options.B: Paani bachane ke liye do flush options (full aur half) provide karna

questions.explanation: Dual-flush toilets mein users apni જરૂરત ke hisaab se kam ya zyada paani ka flush option select kar sakte hain, jisse significant water savings hoti hain.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'xeriscaping' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Drought-tolerant plants aur efficient irrigation ka use karke water-wise landscaping
options.C: Sirf artificial turf ka use karna

questions.explanation: Xeriscaping landscaping ka ek method hai jo minimal ya no supplemental irrigation use karta hai, jisme native aur drought-tolerant plants lagaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Sub-metering systems Green Buildings mein kyon install kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Sirf total building water consumption check karne ke liye
options.B: Individual areas ya systems ke water consumption ko monitor karna aur leaks identify karna

questions.explanation: Sub-metering se specific areas ya equipment ke water usage ko track kiya ja sakta hai, jisse waste identify hota hai aur conservation efforts ko target kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'condensate recovery' ka kya use hai?

options.B: HVAC systems se nikalne wale condensate water ko collect karke reuse karna

questions.explanation: Air conditioning units se nikalne wala condensate water clean hota hai aur use non-potable uses jaise irrigation ya cooling tower make-up water ke liye recover kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'smart irrigation systems' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Har din ek hi amount mein paani dena
options.B: Weather conditions, soil moisture aur plant needs ke according irrigation ko optimize karna

questions.explanation: Smart irrigation systems sensors aur weather data ka use karke sirf tabhi paani dete hain jab zarurat ho, jisse water waste kam hota hai.

questions.question: Potable water ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Drinking ke liye safe paani

questions.explanation: Potable water woh paani hai jo peene aur cooking ke liye suitable hai aur usme harmful contaminants nahi hote.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'constructed wetlands' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Wastewater treat karne ke liye natural ecosystem ka use karna

questions.explanation: Constructed wetlands plants, soil aur microorganisms ka use karke wastewater se pollutants remove karte hain, jo ek eco-friendly treatment method hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein water-efficient appliances ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Energy Star certified dishwasher

questions.explanation: Energy Star certified dishwashers aur washing machines kam paani aur energy use karte hain, jisse resource conservation hota hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'drip irrigation' system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Evaporation se zyada water loss hona
options.B: Paani ko seedhe plant roots tak deliver karna, jisse water waste kam hota hai
options.C: Plants ko evenly water distribute na karna

questions.explanation: Drip irrigation paani ko slow aur directly plant roots tak deliver karta hai, jisse evaporation aur runoff se hone wala water loss minimize hota hai.

questions.question: Cooling towers mein water efficiency improve karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: High-efficiency drift eliminators use karna aur water treatment optimize karna

questions.explanation: High-efficiency drift eliminators water droplets ke loss ko kam karte hain, aur proper water treatment se make-up water ki zarurat kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein water fixtures leak detection systems ka kya role hai?

options.B: Leaks ko detect karna aur water waste prevent karna

questions.explanation: Leak detection systems paani ke anavashyak nuksaan ko pehchan kar use rokte hain, jisse water conservation hota hai aur damage se bacha jaata hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein paani ki quality maintain karne ke liye kya kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Regular testing, filtration aur appropriate treatment methods ka use karna
options.D: Paani ko bina treat kiye use karna

questions.explanation: Paani ki quality ko regular testing, proper filtration aur zarurat ke hisaab se treatment se maintain kiya jaata hai, especially jab greywater ya rainwater use ho raha ho.

questions.question: Indoor Environmental Quality (IEQ) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Building ke andar ke environment ki quality jo occupants ke health aur comfort ko affect karti hai

questions.explanation: IEQ mein indoor air quality, thermal comfort, lighting, aur acoustics jaise factors shamil hain jo building occupants ke well-being par asar dalte hain.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'good indoor air quality' kaise achieve ki jaati hai?

options.B: Low-VOC materials, proper ventilation aur air filtration se
options.C: Zyada chemical cleaning products use karke

questions.explanation: Low-VOC products se harmful emissions kam hote hain, proper ventilation fresh air provide karta hai, aur filtration air pollutants ko remove karta hai.

questions.question: Thermal comfort Green Building mein kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf energy save karne ke liye
options.B: Occupants ki productivity aur satisfaction ke liye
options.C: Building ke structural integrity ke liye
options.D: Outdoor temperature control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Thermal comfort ka matlab hai ki occupants ko building ke andar na zyada garmi lage na zyada thand, jisse unki comfort aur productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'waste management hierarchy' ka correct order kya hai?

options.B: Reduce > Reuse > Recycle > Recover > Dispose

questions.explanation: Waste management hierarchy ka mukhya uddeshya waste generation ko kam karna hai. Reduce, Reuse, Recycle, Recover aur Dispose iska sahi sequence hai.

questions.question: Construction waste ko kam karne ka ek effective tarika kya hai?

options.A: Site par zyada materials order karna
options.B: Efficient material purchasing, prefabrication aur on-site recycling
options.C: Saare waste ko landfill mein fenk dena

questions.explanation: Material waste ko kam karne ke liye precise planning, factory-made components ka use, aur waste ko site par hi alag karke recycle karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'acoustics' kyon important hai?

options.B: Noise pollution kam karna aur sound comfort provide karna

questions.explanation: Good acoustics se building ke andar ka noise level control hota hai, jisse occupants ko concentration aur communication mein asaani hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'daylight glare' ko control karne ke liye kya kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Blinds, shades, light shelves aur proper window orientation ka use karna

questions.explanation: Glare control devices sunlight ko direct aankhon mein aane se rokte hain, jisse visual comfort maintain rehta hai aur daylighting ka fayda bhi milta hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'source reduction' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Waste generate hone se pehle hi use kam karna
options.D: Waste ko energy mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Source reduction waste management hierarchy ka sabse pehla aur sabse effective step hai, jisme products ko is tarah design aur use kiya jaata hai ki kam waste generate ho.

questions.question: Green Building mein 'green cleaning products' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Harmful chemicals se bachna aur indoor air quality improve karna
options.C: Costly hona aur less effective hona

questions.explanation: Green cleaning products non-toxic aur biodegradable hote hain, jo indoor air quality ko kharab nahi karte aur occupants ke health ke liye safe hote hain.

questions.question: Indoor air pollutants ka ek common source kya hai?

options.B: Low-VOC paints
options.C: Building materials, furniture aur cleaning products se nikalne wale VOCs

questions.explanation: Building materials, furniture, carpets aur cleaning products se VOCs aur formaldehyde jaise chemicals release hote hain jo indoor air quality ko degrade karte hain.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'post-occupancy evaluation' (POE) kyon ki jaati hai?

options.A: Sirf building ki construction cost check karne ke liye
options.B: Building ke actual performance aur occupants ke satisfaction ko assess karne ke liye
options.C: Building ke design flaws ignore karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf energy bills check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: POE building ke use ke baad uska evaluation hai, jisme energy consumption, water use, indoor environment aur user satisfaction jaise factors ko analyze kiya jaata hai taaki future projects improve ho sakein.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'waste auditing' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Waste streams ko identify karna, quantify karna aur reduction strategies develop karna

questions.explanation: Waste auditing se yeh pata chalta hai ki kis type aur kitna waste generate ho raha hai, jisse effective waste reduction aur recycling programs design kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'biophilic design' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Natural elements ko building design se exclude karna
options.B: Building design mein nature aur natural processes ko integrate karna

questions.explanation: Biophilic design natural light, ventilation, plants aur natural views jaise elements ko building mein incorporate karta hai, jisse occupants ka physical aur mental well-being improve hota hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'waste-to-energy' processes ka kya use hai?

options.A: Waste ko landfill mein fenk dena
options.B: Non-recyclable waste se energy generate karna
options.C: Sirf organic waste ko dispose karna
options.D: Waste ko jalana bina energy recovery ke

questions.explanation: Waste-to-energy processes non-recyclable waste ko electricity ya heat mein convert karte hain, jisse landfill space kam hota hai aur energy generate hoti hai.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'indoor air quality monitoring' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf temperature check karne ke liye
options.B: Pollutants aur comfort parameters ko track karna aur health risks kam karna
options.C: Outdoor air quality check karne ke liye
options.D: Building ki security monitor karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Indoor air quality monitoring se CO2, VOCs, particulate matter, temperature aur humidity jaise parameters ko track kiya jaata hai, jisse potential health risks ko identify aur mitigate kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Green Buildings mein 'composting' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Organic waste ko landfill mein bhejna
options.B: Organic waste ko nutrient-rich soil amendment mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Composting organic waste (food scraps, yard waste) ko decompose karke valuable compost banata hai, jisse landfill waste kam hota hai aur soil fertility badhti hai.

questions.question: India mein Green Building certification ke liye kaunsi agency sabse prominent hai?

options.B: Indian Green Building Council (IGBC)
options.D: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)

questions.explanation: IGBC (Indian Green Building Council) India mein Green Building movement ko lead karta hai aur various rating systems provide karta hai.

questions.question: LEED certification ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design
options.B: Leaders in Eco-friendly Energy Development

questions.explanation: LEED ek internationally recognized Green Building certification system hai, jo U.S. Green Building Council (USGBC) dwara develop kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Green Building certification systems ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Buildings ke environmental performance ko evaluate aur verify karna
options.C: Sirf building ke aesthetic design ko judge karna

questions.explanation: Certification systems standardized criteria ke against building ke design, construction aur operation ki sustainability ko measure karte hain.

questions.question: GRIHA rating system kis country mein develop kiya gaya hai?

options.B: Germany

questions.explanation: GRIHA (Green Rating for Integrated Habitat Assessment) India ka apna Green Building rating system hai, jise TERI (The Energy and Resources Institute) ne develop kiya hai.

questions.question: Green Building policies ka ek objective kya hai?

options.A: Traditional construction methods ko promote karna
options.B: Sustainable construction practices ko encourage karna

questions.explanation: Government policies aur incentives sustainable building practices ko adopt karne ke liye motivate karte hain.

questions.question: LEED certification mein kaunse categories mein credits diye jaate hain?

options.B: Sustainable sites, water efficiency, energy & atmosphere, materials & resources, indoor environmental quality

questions.explanation: LEED ek comprehensive system hai jo building ke environmental performance ke various aspects ko cover karta hai.

questions.question: India mein Green Building projects ke liye government incentives ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Reduced approval time, property tax rebates ya financial assistance

questions.explanation: Indian government aur local bodies Green Buildings ko promote karne ke liye various incentives offer karte hain, jaise fast-track approvals aur tax benefits.

questions.question: IGBC certification ke highest level ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: IGBC Gold

questions.explanation: IGBC rating system mein 4 levels hain: Certified, Silver, Gold aur Platinum, jisme Platinum highest achievement level hai.

questions.question: Green Building codes ka kya role hai?

options.B: Building construction aur operation ke liye mandatory environmental performance standards set karna
options.D: Building permit process ko complicated banana

questions.explanation: Green Building codes legal requirements hain jo minimum environmental performance standards ko enforce karte hain, jaise energy efficiency aur water conservation.

questions.question: BEE Star Rating kis cheez se related hai?

options.B: Energy efficiency of appliances aur buildings

questions.explanation: BEE (Bureau of Energy Efficiency) India mein appliances aur buildings ke liye energy efficiency standards aur ratings provide karta hai.

questions.question: WELL Building Standard kis cheez par focus karta hai?

options.B: Building occupants ke health aur well-being par

questions.explanation: WELL Building Standard building ke design, construction aur operations ko assess karta hai ki woh occupants ke health aur well-being ko kaise support karte hain (air, water, nourishment, light, fitness, comfort, mind).

questions.question: Green Building certification ka ek benefit kya hai developers ke liye?

options.B: Enhanced marketability aur brand image

questions.explanation: Certified Green Buildings ki market value zyada hoti hai aur yeh tenants ko attract karte hain jo sustainable spaces prefer karte hain.

questions.question: Paris Agreement ka Green Buildings par kya impact hai?

options.B: Countries ko greenhouse gas emissions kam karne ke liye encourage karna, jisme buildings ka role important hai
options.C: Fossil fuels ka use promote karna
options.D: Sustainable development goals ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Paris Agreement climate change se ladne ke liye ek international treaty hai. Buildings significant energy consume karte hain aur emissions generate karte hain, isliye Green Buildings is agreement ke goals ko achieve karne mein critical hain.

questions.question: IGBC Green Homes rating system kis type ki buildings ke liye hai?

options.B: Residential buildings

questions.explanation: IGBC Green Homes rating system specifically residential projects ke liye design kiya gaya hai, jo sustainable homes banane par focus karta hai.

questions.question: Net-Zero Energy Building (NZEB) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Building jo zyada energy consume karti hai
options.B: Building jo utni hi energy produce karti hai jitni woh consume karti hai
options.C: Building jo bilkul energy use nahi karti
options.D: Building jo sirf grid se energy leti hai

questions.explanation: NZEB woh building hai jo on-site renewable energy sources se saal bhar mein utni hi energy generate karti hai jitni woh consume karti hai.

questions.question: Green Building certification achieve karne ke liye project ko kis process se guzarna padta hai?

options.B: Design aur construction stages mein stringent guidelines follow karna aur documentation submit karke third-party verification karwana
options.D: Koi specific process follow na karna

questions.explanation: Certification ke liye project ko specific criteria meet karne hote hain, detailed documentation provide karna hota hai aur ek independent third-party agency dwara verification hota hai.
